sections.heading: General Response
paragraphs: We thank the reviewer for their careful reading and constructive feedback.
We have addressed each comment individually below and made corresponding revisions to the manuscript.[^1]

items.comment: The introduction does not adequately situate the contribution within the existing literature.
items.response: We have expanded the literature review in Section 2 to include recent work by Smith (2025) and Jones (2024), and added a paragraph clarifying our contribution relative to these studies.
items.revision_made: Added two paragraphs to Section 2 (pp. 4-5) and revised the final paragraph of the Introduction.

items.comment: Table 3 is difficult to read. Consider splitting into two tables.
items.response: We agree and have split Table 3 into Tables 3a and 3b, with 3a reporting baseline results and 3b reporting robustness checks.
items.revision_made: Replaced Table 3 with Tables 3a and 3b on pp. 12-13.

items.comment: The conclusion overstates the policy implications given the data limitations acknowledged in Section 5.
items.response: We have tempered the language in the Conclusion to align with the caveats discussed in Section 5.

footnotes.1: See Smith (2025) for a comprehensive review of this literature.
